name: Sirdaryo
description: Sirdaryo Region was formed 16 February 1963 on the left bank of the Syr Darya. Capital Gulistan; population 925,000+ (2024); area 4,280 km². Borders Kazakhstan, Tajikistan, Tashkent and Jizzakh regions; economy based on cotton, grain and industry.

monuments.title: Syr Darya riverbank
monuments.info: The Syr Darya is one of Central Asia’s longest rivers (~3,019 km with the Naryn), flowing through Uzbekistan, Tajikistan, Kyrgyzstan and Kazakhstan. The region lies mainly on the left bank near the Mirzachul desert; banks are being cleaned for ecology and recreation — fishing and nature outings.
